title: Australian Vegan Dumplings
description: A hearty, plant-based Australian-inspired dumpling dish with a flavorful filling. Perfect for a cozy night in.
instructions: In a large pan, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the grilled portobello mushrooms and cook until tender.
Add the smoked paprika, Australian-Style Vegan BBQ Sauce, soy sauce, and rice vinegar to the pan.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook the vegan dumpling wrappers according to package instructions.
Assemble the dumplings by placing a tablespoon of the mushroom mixture onto a wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
When the oil is hot, add the dumplings to the pan and cook until golden brown on the bottom.
Flip the dumplings and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot with chopped cilantro, scallions, and crispy fried shallots on top.
